name: listPrivateNetworkWorkspaces
description:
Gets information about workspaces added to your team's Private API Network.

WARNING: This tool is for Private API Network management, not for general workspace operations. For workspace management use: getWorkspaces, getWorkspace, createWorkspace, updateWorkspace, deleteWorkspace.

name.description: Return only workspaces whose name includes the given value. Matching is not case-sensitive.

summary.description: Return only workspaces whose summary includes the given value. Matching is not case-sensitive.

description.description: Return only workspaces whose description includes the given value. Matching is not case-sensitive.

since.description: Return only results created since the given time, in [ISO 8601](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc3339#section-5.6) format. This value cannot be later than the `until` value.

until.description: Return only results created until this given time, in [ISO 8601](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc3339#section-5.6) format. This value cannot be earlier than the `since` value.

addedBy.description: Return only workspaces published by the given user ID.

sort.description: Sort the results by the given value. If you use this query parameter, you must also use the `direction` parameter.

direction.description: Sort in ascending (`asc`) or descending (`desc`) order. Matching is not case-sensitive. If you use this query parameter, you must also use the `sort` parameter.

createdBy.description: Return only results created by the given user ID.

offset.description: The zero-based offset of the first item to return.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return. If the value exceeds the maximum value of `1000`, then the system uses the `1000` value.
